title: En piga bland pigor
writer: Carlo Keil-Möller, Ester Blenda E. Nordström
actors: Magda Holm, Georg Blomstedt, Nils Lundell
plot: Alice is engaged with Sven. She is interested in having fun and dancing, preferably with Faustino della Novarro. Sven gets upset by her behavior. They break the engagement. Alice finds work as a maid on a farm.
